why: Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:login_acknowledged must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. The official fixture is ServerboundLoginAcknowledgedPacket.INSTANCE, terminal, and encoded by StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE); this is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not Configuration entry, state transition handling, cookie_response support, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test fails to compile because Stevenarella has no LoginAcknowledged packet variant and the current Protocol 775 Login serverbound version table has no mapping for official packet id 0x03.
stop_boundary: Implement only the Login serverbound singleton packet surface and Protocol 775 minecraft:login_acknowledged / 0x03 packet id mapping needed for the exact oracle test. Do not change official answers, broaden login runtime behavior, infer Configuration entry, add cookie_response, or add later Login packets.
